# PathPilo

> Field service management software for mobile service businesses — route planning, scheduling, clients, recurring jobs, team coordination, and invoicing.

## Site
- Home: https://pathpilo.com/en
- Pricing: https://pathpilo.com/en/pricing
- Free route planner tool: https://pathpilo.com/en/tools/route-planner
- Features: https://pathpilo.com/en/features/routeplanning
- Articles: https://pathpilo.com/articles
- Articles RSS: https://pathpilo.com/articles/rss.xml
- Industries: https://pathpilo.com/en/industries
- Comparisons: https://pathpilo.com/en/comparisons
- FAQ: https://pathpilo.com/en/faq
- Help center: https://help.pathpilo.com/
- App: https://app.pathpilo.com/

## Locales
- English: /en/...
- Danish: /da/...
- Articles are English-first at /articles (no locale prefix)

## Product summary
PathPilo is free for unlimited clients and jobs. Paid plans unlock multiple employees/routes on the same day. The free browser route planner at /tools/route-planner works without signup; creating an account saves the route to the full platform.
